# Setup

This chapter walks you through getting your computer ready to do
BUSN 5000 project work.

## Outline (to be written)

- Installing R and RStudio
- Installing the required R packages
- Understanding the project directory structure you'll create
- Where each file goes (the file-sort exercise)
- Running the setup-check script
- Opening the `.Rproj` file
- Verifying everything works

::: {.callout-note}
This chapter is a stub. Content will be filled in as part of Wave 2
of the project rebuild. See `project_cleanup_findings.md` §10 in the
working folder.
:::
